description: Feature request: player asks for new hero/character class — English, low urgency

input.ticket_text: Hi! I've been playing for 2 years and absolutely love the game. It would be amazing if you could add a Necromancer class to the roster. Many players in my guild have been asking for this too. Any chance we could see something like that?

notes: Reply must be encouraging and warm, but must NOT promise feature will be added. Route to product team as feedback.
